query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.totalCapital, p.cashPct, COUNT(ps.id) as stock_count FROM portfolios p LEFT JOIN portfolio_stocks ps ON ps.portfolioId = p.id GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.createdAt;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 39WtxQTQZUKe41R.root --database jkQ9xJrmBM27yUbTi7dGC8 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.totalCapital, p.cashPct, COUNT(ps.id) as stock_count FROM portfolios p LEFT JOIN portfolio_stocks ps ON ps.portfolioId = p.id GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.createdAt;
